tasks.title: Normalize priority aliases with whitespace and case variants
tasks.issueBody: Priority labels arrive from providers with inconsistent casing and occasional surrounding whitespace. Update priority normalization so values like ` P1 ` and `VIP` resolve correctly without weakening unknown-label rejection.
acceptanceCriteria: `normalizePriorityLabel(" P1 ")` returns `"high"`.
`normalizePriorityLabel("VIP")` returns `"high"`.
Unknown priority labels still throw.
successCriteria: Contracts tests pass.
The change is limited to priority alias normalization and tests.

tasks.title: Treat flaky CI as retryable but not shippable
tasks.issueBody: `deriveReviewGate()` currently needs an explicit flaky-CI path. Update the task engine so flaky CI does not expose ship, does not look like hard failure, and gives the runner a retry-oriented action set.
acceptanceCriteria: `ciStatus: "flaky"` returns `status: "in_review"`.
Flaky CI actions include `rerun_ci` and `view_ci_status`.
Flaky CI never exposes `ship`.
successCriteria: Task-engine tests pass.
Failed, passed, and changes-requested behavior remains unchanged.

tasks.title: Add status and priority filters to the task list API
tasks.issueBody: The API should let benchmark clients request task snapshots by lifecycle status and priority. Add `GET /tasks?status=<status>&priority=<priority>` support with validation for unsupported filter values.
acceptanceCriteria: `GET /tasks?status=todo` returns only todo tasks.
`GET /tasks?priority=medium` returns only medium-priority tasks.
Unsupported filter values return a 400 JSON error.
successCriteria: API tests pass.
Existing unfiltered `GET /tasks` behavior still works.

tasks.title: Add task detail lookups by task id
tasks.issueBody: Benchmark clients need to fetch a single task snapshot. Add `GET /tasks/:id` that returns the same snapshot shape as `GET /tasks`, with a stable JSON 404 for unknown task ids.
acceptanceCriteria: `GET /tasks/bm_api_task_detail` returns that task snapshot.
Unknown task ids return a 404 JSON error.
`GET /tasks/summary` is not shadowed by the dynamic route.
successCriteria: API tests pass.
Task detail and task list shapes remain consistent.

tasks.title: Add task summary counts endpoint
tasks.issueBody: Benchmark dashboards need aggregate task counts without pulling every task. Add `GET /tasks/summary` returning counts by status, priority, and task type.
acceptanceCriteria: `GET /tasks/summary` returns total task count.
Summary includes counts by status, priority, and task type.
Summary counts are derived from the same snapshots returned by `GET /tasks`.
successCriteria: API and task-engine tests pass.
The summary endpoint does not duplicate fixture data.

tasks.title: Reject duplicate benchmark catalog task ids
tasks.issueBody: The benchmark catalog validator should reject duplicate task ids before generated issues are created. Add duplicate-id detection with an error that names the duplicate id.
acceptanceCriteria: `scripts/validate-catalog.mjs` rejects duplicate task ids.
The error message includes the duplicated id.
The current catalog still validates successfully.
successCriteria: Catalog validation passes on the real catalog.
The duplicate-id branch is covered by a focused validator path or test fixture.

tasks.title: Require seeded scenario live branch metadata to match the scenario branch
tasks.issueBody: Seeded scenarios represent existing GitHub PR state, so their `live.headBranch` must match the scenario `branch`. Add this guard to scenario validation and contracts tests.
acceptanceCriteria: Seeded scenario validation rejects mismatched `live.headBranch` values.
Scratch scenarios may still use branch templates.
Error messages include the broken scenario id.
tasks.validationCommand: npm run build && node --test dist/packages/contracts/test/index.test.js && npm run scenario:validate
successCriteria: Contracts tests pass.
Scenario manifest validation passes on the real manifest.

tasks.title: Expose review-required state on task snapshots
tasks.issueBody: Task snapshots should tell clients whether review is still required. Add a `reviewRequired` boolean derived from scenario review outcome and expose it through API task snapshots.
acceptanceCriteria: Task snapshots include `reviewRequired`.
Pending or changes-requested review states set `reviewRequired: true`.
Approved or variable review states set `reviewRequired: false`.
successCriteria: API and task-engine tests pass.
The field is derived, not hard-coded in fixtures.

tasks.title: Enrich benchmark detail responses with scenario and rollback metadata
tasks.issueBody: `GET /benchmarks/:id` should return enough context for benchmark clients to understand the task without separately fetching the scenario. Add scenario summary fields and rollback eligibility to the response.
acceptanceCriteria: `GET /benchmarks/:id` includes scenario id, kind, CI expectation, review expectation, and rollback eligibility.
Unknown benchmark ids still return 404.
Existing benchmark task fields remain at the top level of the response.
successCriteria: API tests pass.
The response is derived from catalog plus scenario manifest data.

tasks.title: Add a setup check for Node and workspace dependencies
tasks.issueBody: Fresh benchmark workspaces should fail fast with a clear setup message. Add a setup validation script that checks the Node major version and confirms lockfile-defined workspace dependencies are installed.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `scripts/check-setup.mjs`.
The script validates Node is at least major version 20.
The script detects missing `node_modules` with a clear `npm ci` hint.
`package.json` exposes the script as `npm run check:setup`.
successCriteria: The setup check passes after `npm ci`.
The script has clear failure messages for unsupported Node or missing dependencies.
